# israel-welfare-inspection-dataset-builder

Planning/scaffold repository for an authorized public-data transparency ETL
pipeline. Public outputs are now planned as layered dataset products: report
index, source documents/PDF identity, raw extracted text, processed canonical
tables, and advanced analytics. This builder repo contains code, schemas,
tests, docs, configs, CI, and small reviewed fixtures. Generated dataset
artifacts belong in the paired data repo:
`AdanimInstitue/israel-welfare-inspection-dataset`.

## Core Tree

```text
src/
  welfare_inspections/
    __init__.py      package version
    cli.py           Typer CLI entrypoint with manual discovery command
    collect/
      govil_client.py       conservative manual Gov.il HTTP client
      report_index.py       manual report-index collector/exporter
      llm_extract.py        offline LLM candidate contracts/plumbing/evaluator
      publish.py            dry-run publication PR planning/gate contracts
      reconcile.py          offline reconciliation and dry-run backfill plumbing
      weekly.py             weekly dry-run review-artifact plan contracts
      export.py             manual schema validation and local report exports
      findings.py           offline finding-level candidate/review contracts
      manifest.py           source JSONL and diagnostics readers/writers
      models.py             Pydantic source discovery contracts
      pdf_download.py       manual PDF download/checksum manifest layer
      pdf_render.py         manual local PDF page rendering artifact layer
      pdf_text.py           manual embedded PDF text extraction diagnostics
      metadata_parser.py    manual deterministic top-level metadata parser
      portal_discovery.py   skip-based HTML/structured-endpoint orchestration
      portal_parser.py      Gov.il-like HTML and DynamicCollector parser
      settings.py           environment-configurable manual command defaults
    text_normalization.py   deterministic extracted-text normalization helpers

schemas/
  report.schema.json       canonical PR 6 report export row contract
  rendered_page_artifact.schema.json  PR 7 rendered image artifact contract
  llm_extraction_candidate.schema.json PR 7 LLM candidate contract
  llm_evaluation_report.schema.json    PR 7 offline evaluation report contract
  extraction_candidate.schema.json     PR 8 common candidate compatibility contract
  finding_candidate.schema.json        PR 11 finding candidate contract
  finding_extraction_diagnostics.schema.json PR 11 finding diagnostics contract
  reconciliation_decision.schema.json  PR 8 field decision contract
  reconciliation_diagnostics.schema.json PR 8 reconciliation diagnostics contract
  reconciled_report_metadata.schema.json PR 8 reconciled metadata contract
  backfill_diagnostics.schema.json     PR 8 dry-run backfill diagnostics contract
  facility.schema.json     placeholder facility contract
  inspection.schema.json   placeholder inspection finding contract
  datapackage.schema.json  placeholder data-package contract

tests/
  test_imports.py      package and CLI smoke tests
  test_docs_exist.py   docs/schema existence and content-contract tests
  test_report_index.py mocked report-index collection/export tests
  test_pdf_download.py mocked manifest/download/checksum tests
  test_pdf_text_extraction.py synthetic embedded-text/normalization tests
  test_pdf_render.py synthetic page rendering/artifact contract tests
  test_llm_extract.py mocked LLM candidate/evaluation contract tests
  test_reconcile.py synthetic reconciliation/backfill contract tests
  test_publish.py   synthetic publication planning/gate/PR wording tests
  test_weekly.py   synthetic weekly workflow planning/artifact guard tests
  test_source_discovery.py mocked discovery/parser/manifest tests
  test_metadata_parser.py synthetic top-level metadata parser tests
  test_export.py      synthetic schema validation/local export tests
  test_findings.py    synthetic finding candidate/review plumbing tests

docs/
  architecture.md
  source_site_notes.md
  schema.md
  extraction_methodology.md
  data_quality.md
  privacy_and_publication_policy.md
  operations.md
  roadmap.md
  implementation_plan.md

data_samples/
  raw_pdfs/           placeholder only; real PDFs require explicit review
  expected_outputs/   future text-based golden outputs

.github/
  workflows/ci.yml
  workflows/weekly-artifacts.yml
  workflows/pr-agent-context-refresh.yml
  pr-agent-context-template.md
```

## Critical Contracts

- Static agent rules: `AGENTS.md`
- Dynamic agent state: `.agent-plan.md`
- Canonical source URL and pagination notes: `docs/source_site_notes.md`
- Layered dataset model and canonical entity model: `docs/schema.md`
- Layered extraction strategy: `docs/extraction_methodology.md`
- Required LLM/multimodal extraction and reconciliation plan:
  `docs/extraction_methodology.md`, `docs/architecture.md`,
  `docs/implementation_plan.md`, and `docs/roadmap.md`
- Fixture policy and quality model: `docs/data_quality.md`
- Privacy, disclaimer, and CC BY 4.0 publication policy:
  `docs/privacy_and_publication_policy.md`
- Immediate roadmap: `docs/roadmap.md` and `docs/implementation_plan.md`
- Current local report export contract: `schemas/report.schema.json`
- Current rendered page contract:
  `schemas/rendered_page_artifact.schema.json`
- Current LLM candidate contract:
  `schemas/llm_extraction_candidate.schema.json`
- Current offline LLM evaluation contract:
  `schemas/llm_evaluation_report.schema.json`
- Current reconciliation and backfill contracts:
  `schemas/extraction_candidate.schema.json`,
  `schemas/reconciliation_decision.schema.json`,
  `schemas/reconciliation_diagnostics.schema.json`,
  `schemas/reconciled_report_metadata.schema.json`, and
  `schemas/backfill_diagnostics.schema.json`
- Current finding-level review contracts:
  `schemas/finding_candidate.schema.json`,
  `schemas/finding_extraction_diagnostics.schema.json`, and
  `schemas/inspection.schema.json`
- Manual v0 report index publication plan:
  `docs/implementation_plan.md`, `docs/operations.md`,
  `docs/privacy_and_publication_policy.md`, and `docs/data_quality.md`
- Weekly review-artifact planning contract:
  `src/welfare_inspections/collect/weekly.py`,
  `.github/workflows/weekly-artifacts.yml`, and `docs/operations.md`
- Publication PR planning contract:
  `src/welfare_inspections/collect/publish.py`, `docs/operations.md`,
  `docs/privacy_and_publication_policy.md`, and `docs/data_quality.md`

## Current Planning Direction

The next implementation target is the report index layer: a source-observed
CSV/JSONL inventory of all reports visible on the Gov.il listing page. PR 13
adds `welfare-inspections collect-report-index`, which writes ignored local
`outputs/report_index/reports_index.csv`, `reports_index.jsonl`, and
`report_index_diagnostics.json`. The CSV keeps exactly the Hebrew columns
`שם מסגרת`, `סוג מסגרת`, `סמל מסגרת`, `מינהל`, `מחוז`, and `תאריך ביצוע`.
Internal English aliases use `administration` for `מינהל` and `district` for
`מחוז`.

The report index layer must not download PDFs, parse report text, run OCR, call
LLM providers, extract findings, normalize facility names, infer missing
values, or publish advanced analytics. It preserves stable IDs, source links,
PDF links where visible, pagination/source metadata, collection run metadata,
collector version, field coverage, duplicate/missing-field diagnostics, and
malformed date-as-source-text warnings.

Real PDF inspection still matters for downstream layers: deterministic
embedded-text metadata parsing is not sufficient for content-derived
publication. Those later layers require deterministic extraction, rendered page
artifacts, embedded-text LLM extraction, multimodal LLM extraction, candidate
reconciliation, validation, and PR-based publication. Weekly jobs process
new/changed documents; backfill jobs reprocess history when schemas, prompts,
models, renderers, parsers, normalization, or reconciliation rules change.

LLM planning constraints:

- rendered page artifacts need immutable hashes and a versioned render profile
- LLM candidates need immutable source PDF, text, image/crop, and prompt input
  hashes
- mocked provider tests are not a quality gate
- publication needs an LLM evaluation report with field-level coverage,
  correctness, and regression results
- material reconciliation conflicts stay `needs_review` unless deterministic
  rules or explicit agreement thresholds resolve them
- data-repo publication is planned by `publish-plan`, remains PR-based, and
  fails closed before production actions unless reviewed inputs, clear gates,
  explicit approval, and credentials are present
- finding-level extraction is currently PR 11 review plumbing only:
  `extract-findings` supports dry-run/mock local fixtures, writes ignored
  sidecars, and does not feed canonical exports or publication inputs

## Automation

- Local validation: `python -m pip install -e ".[dev]"`, `ruff check .`,
  `pytest`, `python -m welfare_inspections.cli collect-report-index --help`,
  `python -m welfare_inspections.cli reconcile --help`,
  `python -m welfare_inspections.cli backfill --help`,
  `python -m welfare_inspections.cli weekly-plan --help`,
  `python -m welfare_inspections.cli publish-plan --help`
- CI: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- Weekly review artifacts: `.github/workflows/weekly-artifacts.yml`
- PR context comments and patch coverage: `pr-agent-context` job in CI
- Review/check refresh comments: `.github/workflows/pr-agent-context-refresh.yml`
